text_block_list.text:
Gold City's debut delights the members of the
photography team she works with.

However, they see her running as an accessory to
her modeling career, a means of improving her
image within the industry.

This shocks her to no small degree. The staff
members she's known for so many years have no
real grasp of how she feels.

I promise to help her convey her true feelings
through her running.
